case_title: RICHARD Y. LEE VS. WILLIAM ONG et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, RICHARD Y. AS TO DEFENDANT ONG, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-21-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-18-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-06-2011
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, RICHARD Y.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, RICHARD Y. HEARING SET FOR JUN-15-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-15-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF RICHARD LEE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF LEE, RICHARD Y.
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY PAID BY PLAINTIFF RICHARD LEE
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: FEES PAID PLAINTIFF RICHARD Y. LEE ON 6/22/11. (206)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, RICHARD Y. SERVED JUN-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ONG, WILLIAM
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-21-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
